Metadata.title: Parabellum | Military Equipment Analytics
Metadata.description: Open-source military equipment loss tracking and analytics platform with verified data, interactive charts, and geospatial mapping.

HomePage.heroDescription: Verified, open-source intelligence on military equipment losses. Browse by conflict, category, or country. All entries include photographic evidence and geolocation data.
HomePage.recentHint: Loss cards will render here once Strapi content types are populated.
